rootCause: PublicMobileAppLayer was rendered after legacy Hero/FeatureRail and controlled by scattered max-width 768px CSS instead of a shell authority.
AdminMobileAppLayer was rendered inside the desktop admin page structure, leaving tablet widths in a mixed desktop/mobile authority zone.
Tablet widths 768-1023 did not have an explicit app-shell authority and could fall into squeezed desktop/tablet hybrid behavior.
Manifest icon path used relative assets/* inside a hashed manifest under /assets, producing /assets/assets/* browser warnings.

responsiveAuthority.mobile: 0-767px: responsive public/admin app shells primary; desktop shells hidden.
responsiveAuthority.tablet: 768-1023px: responsive public/admin app shells primary with stable wider app container.
responsiveAuthority.desktop: 1024px+: existing desktop public/admin shells primary; app shells hidden.

commands: npm run typecheck (PATH injected to nvm node) PASS
npm run lint (PATH injected to nvm node) PASS
npx/wrangler deploy via node wrangler.js PASS
CDP deployed login form smoke PASS
CDP deployed notice reflection smoke PASS

verificationSummary.publicPhone: 360/375/390/412/430 overflow 0; responsive public app visible; legacy hero hidden.
verificationSummary.publicTablet: 768/820 overflow 0; responsive public app visible; legacy desktop shell hidden.
verificationSummary.publicDesktop: 1024/1440 overflow 0; desktop public shell visible; app shell hidden.
verificationSummary.adminBeforeLogin: 375 overflow 0; login gate visible; admin body hidden.
verificationSummary.adminAfterLogin: 390/412/768/820 overflow 0; responsive admin app visible; desktop admin hidden.
verificationSummary.adminDesktop: 1024/1440 overflow 0; desktop admin shell visible; app shell hidden.

remainingHold: Manual real-device phone/tablet visual confirmation by user remains external.
Server auth/D1/R2 production completion remains out of scope for this UI hotfix.
Admin CRUD still uses current demo/local fallback where server persistence is not fully configured.
